plugins.name: product-dev
plugins.description: AI-assisted product development framework — vague idea to technical spec through structured UX research, hypothesis formation, and prototype planning. Ships 5 commands (/idea, /problem, /spec, /compile, /summary), 4 skills, and a tech-spec-writer subagent.

plugins.name: clownware-code-tools
plugins.description: Universal dev workflow skills — architecture/deployment-readiness auditing (/arch-audit), test-suite auditing (/test-audit), Claude Code skill auditing (/skill-audit), ADR authoring, PR descriptions, root-cause debugging, and test scaffolding — that probe the repo they run in and degrade gracefully.

plugins.name: clownware-astro-tools
plugins.description: Astro + Preact stack skills — component scaffolding and template-aware PR descriptions — following astro-performance-starter conventions with fallbacks for other Astro projects.
